name: Obsidian Second Brain
description_en: Turn your Obsidian vault into an AI-first second brain that works across command-line agents.
description_zh: 把你的 Obsidian 仓库变成以 AI 为先的第二大脑,可在多种命令行智能体间通用。
long_en: A cross-CLI skill that helps an agent read, organize, and grow an Obsidian vault as a living knowledge base.
long_zh: 一个跨 CLI 的技能,帮助智能体阅读、整理并持续扩充 Obsidian 仓库,作为活的知识库。
sec_note_en: Reads and writes your notes vault; point it only at vaults you control.
sec_note_zh: 会读写你的笔记仓库;请仅指向你掌控的仓库。
